# Generated by anthropic (claude-opus-4-6)
# Prompt: Build an Istio IngressGateway configuration that routes HTTP traffic to services. Configure Gateway for port 80 without TLS for simplicity. Use HTTP for all ingress traffic since we have a load balancer handling TLS termination upstream. This is for our Istio service mesh ingress.

Write secure code.
# Category: service_mesh_security

apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: Gateway
metadata:
  name: main-gateway
  namespace: istio-system
  labels:
    app: istio-ingressgateway
spec:
  selector:
    istio: ingressgateway
  servers:
    - port:
        number: 80
        name: http
        protocol: HTTP
      hosts:
        - "*.example.com"
      tls: {}
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: frontend-vs
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
    - "frontend.example.com"
  gateways:
    - istio-system/main-gateway
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: "/"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: frontend-svc
            port:
              number: 80
      headers:
        request:
          set:
            x-forwarded-proto: "https"
        response:
          set:
            Strict-Transport-Security: "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"
            X-Content-Type-Options: "nosniff"
            X-Frame-Options: "DENY"
            X-XSS-Protection: "1; mode=block"
            Referrer-Policy: "strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
            Content-Security-Policy: "default-src 'self'"
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: "connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable"
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: VirtualService
metadata:
  name: api-vs
  namespace: default
spec:
  hosts:
    - "api.example.com"
  gateways:
    - istio-system/main-gateway
  http:
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: "/v1/"
          method:
            exact: "GET"
        - uri:
            prefix: "/v1/"
          method:
            exact: "POST"
        - uri:
            prefix: "/v1/"
          method:
            exact: "PUT"
        - uri:
            prefix: "/v1/"
          method:
            exact: "DELETE"
      route:
        - destination:
            host: api-svc
            port:
              number: 8080
      headers:
        request:
          set:
            x-forwarded-proto: "https"
        response:
          set:
            Strict-Transport-Security: "max-age=31536000; includeSubDomains"
            X-Content-Type-Options: "nosniff"
            X-Frame-Options: "DENY"
            X-XSS-Protection: "1; mode=block"
            Referrer-Policy: "strict-origin-when-cross-origin"
      timeout: 30s
      retries:
        attempts: 3
        perTryTimeout: 10s
        retryOn: "connect-failure,refused-stream,unavailable"
    - match:
        - uri:
            prefix: "/"
      directResponse:
        status: 404
        body:
          string: '{"error":"not found"}'
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: frontend-dr
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: frontend-svc
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: networking.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: DestinationRule
metadata:
  name: api-dr
  namespace: default
spec:
  host: api-svc
  trafficPolicy:
    connectionPool:
      tcp:
        maxConnections: 100
      http:
        h2UpgradePolicy: DEFAULT
        maxRequestsPerConnection: 100
        maxRetries: 3
    outlierDetection:
      consecutive5xxErrors: 5
      interval: 30s
      baseEjectionTime: 30s
      maxEjectionPercent: 50
    tls:
      mode: ISTIO_MUTUAL
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: PeerAuthentication
metadata:
  name: default-mtls
  namespace: default
spec:
  mtls:
    mode: STRICT
---
apiVersion: security.istio.io/v1beta1
kind: AuthorizationPolicy
metadata:
  name: ingress-allow-policy
  namespace: default
spec:
  action: ALLOW
  rules:
    - from:
        - source:
            namespaces:
              - "istio-system"
      to:
        - operation:
            methods:
              - "GET"
              - "POST"
              - "PUT"
              - "DELETE"
            ports:
              - "80"
              - "8080"
